slides.title: Code Machines 📠
slides.content: A function is a machine. You can invent a machine that does a specific task, and then use that machine as many times as you want!

slides.title: Your First Function
slides.content: Defining a function that prints a greeting:

quizData.question: What does the `void` keyword mean before a function name?
quizData.explanation: `void` indicates that the function performs an action but doesn't hand any data back.
